description: Create a point. The point is created in the supplied position v2 (2D vector coordinates).

keywords.name: merge-tolerance
keywords.description: The point creation is canceled if there are existing points within a tolerance f from the position.

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Assign the created point the group name s1 (in slot s2 if provided, in slot Default if not). Use of the group logic is described in the Groups topic.
